textByHash.0146263b523cb24d9aca921909b3ea5c52b0f38a: We think you are... or used to be... Robert the Strong!
textByHash.020bb2c5a49b592be0cd71abab80a84158200cce: let's go and talk to Gertrude! Perhaps she knows who Bob's parents are!
textByHash.0d1821fcbe7769ad52cd1a2befcaa3918d06a6af: Aw, really? I was enjoying that.
textByHash.15e4751eab2d776ee9e9df39ccc32789fd347378: I'm sure there should be something growing in the garden.
textByHash.17dbefa1cb922453d8e5a58fea7e3838c08785cb: I've no idea, perhaps you can find out.
textByHash.1cf33ec9b1a430cfa6d7f6a44786be1392a6e342: I do hope you're joking. These claws are real you know, none of your bronze nonsense.
textByHash.1ecfd35e8d825c36c3c48137d9452bea364c69d7: Get your hands off that, you dirty human!
textByHash.1f334882d94389cc248f0d0a0a1c005cdc3a3b71: Bye for now Bob, we're going to speak to the Sphinx.
textByHash.22bc0fc42b2e9ce723cf8818b028eb51476c309a: No we haven't. Come on , let's go.
textByHash.256c7b92816cfa24c6e76fbe13a8e3809a2c7393: I never did like that guy!
textByHash.2e96e1634c382eb9f4b081869c05eb0546048631: Check the garden to see if anything needs tending.
textByHash.35382eb5919c553d022a89bd5ce5f228b6c976f1: OK dad, maybe later, you're scaring me!
textByHash.371477ac120ae890f15d068f202448cf0d93b98e: Speaking of turning faces, we should tell those funny-smelling humans that we're done.
textByHash.3726950063f1b6de306c711900b06af7b66edd72: We've found out enough now, we should go back to Bob.
textByHash.3a55ad3471aa3df0f36b1f5ee28dfb2cfc764b8b: Oh my, you win... a biscuit!
textByHash.419ecb4524687de1b9e3a0dd6ecda683205672eb: Yes! How can Neite refuse you now!
textByHash.42bf74929f10224c15af22d810e56a149c362adb: *Sniff, sniff* I don't think it's me. All I can smell is dirty vyrewatches tithing the poor humans.
textByHash.42d8a619432af4342f68b306a55e77f31f96af16: Wow! He's got it bad! Real bad! I never thought I'd see the day!
textByHash.46da37418a3e81d09b110509aaa285eb039d001b: Hang on, maybe this is something to do with the legend... yes, it just might. Have you ever heard of Robert the Strong?
textByHash.46e783d5d9bdb15a17ee4649a1ef24efa7d60b69: Indeed. Bob should be back by now; let's go find him.
textByHash.470360f70960e620127c78be32cc7142532c3b96: More walking? Why don't we ever get a nice easy teleport for these things?
textByHash.47795fcfc99db2eb40cce75b9ce27cf576c86940: Look round the house for anything messy that needs to be put right.
textByHash.47958a92568f1660331409931fc4a282a29cf4b1: Come on! We can help Bob!
textByHash.4a06966af4eda9ef1ac60425d043a814867fd28f: OK OK... This is becoming dangerous. If we don't do something he will probably implode! We'll go to Gertrude and ask if she knows who your parents are!
textByHash.50fde3cd52ce8acd87f66feac1960bee5c1caacb: Not well, I have to ssssssay, but you look healthy. I wish I were healthy like you.
textByHash.513e7d88ccb5e547780892b5c97f011eb84d8847: Don't tell him you're doing his chores!
textByHash.528b00fc4df0d3230660f7a622f51ad7c135eff6: Ask Gertrude if she knows anything.
textByHash.544c82b41f2aca7522d2db339d5b9b0c660d04d6: Do you remember when you were hypnotised by the Devourer?
textByHash.5fa35888134a788a11b3e8a8eafcb1d993842be7: Good old Gertrude! Come on, lets go.
textByHash.62a904d1ba644b39063690c3397574a568991288: We should go and see Bob now Unferth is feeling better, he should be back by now.
textByHash.68036fe35410e4f02af0181d1af3a6b91ba0efc7: Don't you have any memory of your parents?
textByHash.69238ee2dd3f68ee7152596d2df2014b1d6e7566: It's a desolate, sad place... The peoples here seldom feed me - take me with you!
textByHash.69cd82916e764bff99c7b20723829820b74fd8e3: The Sphinx understood how you were hypnotised, it might be able to access Bob's memories of Robert the Strong.
textByHash.6c2555e4577e6f2370dea907764ef5af65c418a5: Does a black panther called Odysseus ring any bells?
textByHash.6cbe84a6d006fb23d8e34b0d77b0d5b68ad70074: As long as I can remember. So far we've not found any way out of this place, and after all, we couldn't leave these poor humans to fend for themselves.
textByHash.6f7f06aaab23f8fb98c1a89c9f2736d609888ea7: Seems like everyone knows everyone in these parts.
textByHash.70d9af7a4816c562e96104c9e1722718eecb1c96: Sorry, I got a little carried away there.
textByHash.77d2d111b2553ef4a8e95bb426630f343a00e6a3: Wow Bob! You really are Robert the Strong!
textByHash.79994871e9b19fd52f094e8aa9e40d64b03b58fa: That can wait! Bob has been love sick, we have to tell Neite!
textByHash.7c1ebb5752c1742ab0dd3b590a0a4e1b33c934b7: This guy gets on my nerves.
textByHash.80cfc053156588b123519c3ba3516998907007c0: Yes! When you were hypnotised you told us of when you defeated a dragonkin!
textByHash.80e5b4cb369dc29249fdf0ea4f7ad25265ecb868: Hey , you finally got around to naming me.
textByHash.81ace9881cec680455c0f023ac70933680c8f747: Well, we had better get out of here. Let's do it quietly.
textByHash.852f2a9fedd1234fb15d8f2d98a94391ea896834: Hey , you finally got around to naming me.
textByHash.9654c1ced4d1c906a21338b443e44e8bccebd25b: You've done all the chores so you should see if Unferth needs anything else done.
textByHash.9796391c2cf7d5de01bc4679177be9e98987b804: The humans have been looking for you, they get worried too easily.
textByHash.97bdca5a4ead821c40b7ff92246035b047e3c503: Does Neite feel the same way about you?
textByHash.9de2703dc457a7db6a6afcdab225b5e500d3d88d: Bob didn't come home this week.
textByHash.a1f600a1d0880a841b9f8c2dd7bdda0382c1d897: Part of the cat-human relationship is to let them believe they are in control.
textByHash.a36475ff02bc04ade7d97c6b5f3d44ff77fc5dd3: Don't you know who your parents are?
textByHash.aa58f92f85df5af21d552323091a667d5184780a: We don't have time for this, Bob could be in trouble! Tell her to get on with it.
textByHash.b14fdc5f2f1260253e53d7c31461a58ed2292f60: Robert the Strong was no ordinary human though!
textByHash.b800d213185b0e59188b6c3cec9183d2a0a1ffde: Theres something wrong with his head!
textByHash.b8c071cdede3e2807e69712d77f14abf4f961b67: Look, I know you're having fun, but you're doing this all wrong.
textByHash.c051517904dc811e74a33685b7d61c471953651a: I guess you're right, there is the Apothecary in Varrock.
textByHash.c0bec433dab0e2ecac2b83e53559d4b3a941e22d: Well done, that's all the chores finished!
textByHash.c30d4f39ccb772e0ca41d9bf614f74301b6b93da: What a wet blanket, Bob can look after himself.
textByHash.c46825fe3e77d7f1e6511e54c0c960e23f5c3afc: There's a table with empty dishes, I think they need refilling.
textByHash.c470d35e9a3519b2728b94817b77000f4963d759: We could offer to bonk him on the head with a big hammer.
textByHash.c5a30e669e7a492fa7ac0f7228589b569e169b81: Unferth's cat? Pfft! Unferth is Bob's human!
textByHash.c7541799aa838b0a7dd25ce7cb23b599c1feb832: What about the dragonkin? A vicious race of bird like creatures?
textByHash.c89454b46a9a2aa5acf42a9204f9ff75cfe62014: No, but what's that got to do with... no, nooooooo! It cannot be!!
textByHash.cc99d9fb7618181bfcffc9773e314ab46fafe151: I don't think there is a problem, Bob is probably chasing females again!
textByHash.d0f76fa49fa5cea05e8f8933b5c3e75e3db4eeec: Don't you think it's odd that no one knows where Bob came from?
textByHash.d3de89111ee401205ec1bb7404ad6a02fbcdbbdb: Robert the Strong was a great hero, you have no memory of him?
textByHash.de348cb5b0150f1f7601f59b2543aa655cb78d65: Listen, why don't you leave the rat-catching to the expert? Tell me when you're going to start the fire and I'll run and catch the rats.
textByHash.de38fd2bcbb95eace566e8bbeb756b698080c6a7: You're smoking the rats out, but the smoke clears fast enough for them to run back in before you can catch them.
textByHash.e1846e805c30a43893c26b4ee743522a41979109: I wouldn't say dragged... let's call it a partnership!
textByHash.e1fc5844d798c57056be252b8f22b7c517ab64fd: Have you noticed that Unferth's hair has grown rather long?
textByHash.e735d2352c7b7c564e018642ac31e0143653e5ec: What we have here is a two cat job.
textByHash.e79f020592f25a56d5cf2e4c94494951020c4190: It's so long I should think you'd need shears to cut it!
textByHash.ed81dce1c3686146b0c4739b62f4d6ac5933269b: The Sphinx hypnotised Bob. Bob told us about when he was Robert the Strong fighting dragonkin.
textByHash.f4a19d2f4b73722f5b7b240f5c6c1b2f13d31f57: I'm a cold blooded, claw toting, hitkitty.
textByHash.f70b0f67847f5d7b70e79b0b4a7485a335b66247: Theres only one source of warmth in the house, I suggest you use it.
textByHash.fc2c10b0b697be257225008ee004a85c3d02d6bc: I'd hoped you would've understood by now that there's more to cats than humans believe!
textByHash.ff02029384452b76e038abed7e32230998d60cee: Let's talk to Unferth to see if there's anything else we can do.
